title: PipeShare admin presence refresh throttling (dbg115)
description:
PipeShare was refreshing the admin presence panel on every SSE event and showing a full Loading state each time, which made the UI feel laggy when many presence updates arrived.

This release throttles and debounces those refreshes, avoids duplicate customer-support init, and slows the background heartbeat when the tab is hidden.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Throttle admin presence panel refresh from SSE (presence, support-request, support-clear) to about 2.5s.
Debounce presence panel API refresh (~350ms) and skip Loading flash when content already rendered.
Singleton initCustomerSupport so the addon does not double-register listeners.
Heartbeat interval 20s visible / 60s when tab hidden.
Cache bust dbg115 on client portal index.html.
